offer: For logistics carriers processing 10-20 invoices/month, billing errors cause significant overcharges. We provide a freight invoice auditing tool instead of manual invoice review.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try manual invoice cross-referencing on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Make a short demo video of the tool
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set up reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
